title: Node.js Fundamentals Quiz
description: Test your Node.js runtime and core modules knowledge.

questions.question: Node.js is single-threaded yet handles many concurrent requests. How?

options.text: By spawning a new thread per request
Through non-blocking I/O and the event loop — I/O operations happen asynchronously
By using multiple CPU cores for each request
By queuing all requests and processing them synchronously

questions.question: Which Node.js module should you use for working with file paths?
Why should you never commit a .env file to version control?

options.text: It contains sensitive secrets like API keys and database passwords that would be exposed
Node.js cannot read .env files from git
Environment files are too large for git
